summary: Configuration data structures and loader: defines Config + 6 sub-config types (Telegram, Storage, OpenRouter, Refresh, LLM, Source), Load() function with defaults/validation, and path expansion utility
side_effects: Reads YAML config file from disk via os.ReadFile()
Expands ~ in file paths to user home directory
config_deps: None — this file defines the config system, not consumed by it
notes: Central config data hub. Defines 7 exported types: Config wraps all sub-configs. Load() applies defaults for OpenRouter (model=anthropic/claude-3-haiku, base_url), LLM (default timeouts: 120s for Ollama, 30s for OpenRouter), Refresh (default interval_minutes=30). Backward-compat migration: if LLM.Provider empty but OpenRouter.APIKey set, migrates to new LLM config format. Validation checks required fields per provider (e.g., openrouter_api_key required for OpenRouter). SourceConfig supports type='telegram|rss|reddit|hackernews' with type-specific required fields (url for rss, subreddit for reddit, feed for hackernews).
